title: coreopsis breviligulata
intro: Coreopsis breviligulata, also known as the short-hairy coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis breviligulata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis breviligulata are often made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
